subject: [PATCH v8 12/15] userfaultfd: add UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC for async fault resolution

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd (UFFD) system, called UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC, which allows for asynchronous resolution of read-write page faults. This is useful for working-set tracking in virtual machines where the VMM does not need immediate notification of page faults, but rather can reconstruct the access pattern later via PAGEMAP_SCAN. The patch also upgrades writable private anonymous PTEs when necessary to prevent COW-faulting on re-access. It requires UFFD_FEATURE_RWP and adds new functions and macros to support this feature.
